scripts.build: bun build ./src/main.ts --compile --outfile dist/benchd --target ${BUN_TARGET:-bun-linux-x64} && bun build src/hooks/job-started.ts --compile --outfile dist/hooks/job-started --target ${BUN_TARGET:-bun-linux-x64} && bun build src/hooks/job-completed.ts --compile --outfile dist/hooks/job-completed --target ${BUN_TARGET:-bun-linux-x64}
